items.name: Storage Box
items.flavor_text: A convenient box you can store items in. It's made of wood and easy to move things in and out of.

items.name: Wall Storage Box
items.flavor_text: It may be small, but it can store lots of stuff. Try mounting it on a wall

items.name: Big Storage Box
items.flavor_text: Roughly three times bigger than your standard storage box. You can put a lot of things inside.

items.name: Polygonal Shelf
items.flavor_text: A stylish, eye-catching shelf. Looks hard to use but still functions as a shelf just fine,

items.name: Cardboard Boxes
items.flavor_text: Light cardboard boxes. It doesn't look like they have anything inside

items.name: Worn Wooden Crate
items.flavor_text: A sturdy but somewhat shabby box. Stack a bunch of them to create a warehouse vibe.

items.name: Wooden Crate
items.flavor_text: You have absolutely no idea how to open this box...But you can put stuff on top of it at least!

items.name: Bathtime Set
items.flavor_text: Shampoo, towels and a toy-everything you need to make bath time a blast!

items.name: Cleaning Supplies
items.flavor_text: Detergent, a dust cloth, and a Mareep sponge are all you need to become a cleaning master!

items.name: Shower
items.flavor_text: A shower with a simple design. Place it next to a bathtub to make your bathroom complete

items.name: Bathtub
items.flavor_text: A bathtub with a simple design. Fill it up with water to enjoy a nice soak

items.name: Bouncy Blue Bathtub
items.flavor_text: A bathtub that lets you experience waves and bubbles, even without a single drop of water inside.

items.name: Water Basin
items.flavor_text: Fill this with water so Pokémon can do some watering for you

items.name: Pokémetal
items.flavor_text: Made from smelted Pokémetal fragmants, these can be used to make various items.

items.name: Red Paint
items.flavor_text: Colorful paint made from crushed berries. A must-have when painting.

items.name: Blue Paint
items.flavor_text: Colorful paint made from crushed berries. A must-have when painting.

items.name: White Paint
items.flavor_text: Colorful paint made from crushed berries. A must-have when painting.

items.name: Black Paint
items.flavor_text: Colorful paint made from crushed berries. A must-have when painting.

items.name: Gaming Fridge
items.flavor_text: A chest that's slightly cold to the touch. Ice-type Pokémon will probably enjoy this.

items.name: Gaming Chair
items.flavor_text: With its large backrest and cushions, you could sit comfortable in this chair for a long time.

items.name: Gaming Bed
items.flavor_text: A cool, stylish bed. Flip on the power switch to get a cyberspace vibe going

items.name: Gaming Pc
items.flavor_text: A PC rig that even includes a headset. The monitor can display photos when powered on

items.name: Knitting Supplies
items.flavor_text: Tools for knitting hats, sweaters and the like. Pokémon are captivated by the round balls of yarn

items.name: Gaming Light
items.flavor_text: Emits rainbow light when mounted to a wall and powered on.

items.name: Paint Balloon (white)
items.flavor_text: A colorful balloon filled with paint. You can use it to paint items or buildings

items.name: Cd Rack
items.flavor_text: A rack with CDs on it. Sure to appeal to music lovers

items.name: Magazine Rack
items.flavor_text: This stand has a great selection of weekly magazines and photo books.

items.name: Toy Blocks
items.flavor_text: Stacking toys that are fun to play with. Discover all the different combinations you can make!

items.name: Sandbags
items.flavor_text: A cloth sack filled with dirt and sand. It's pretty bulky and looks heavy

items.name: Metal Drum
items.flavor_text: A smooth, clean canister. It's empty, so it's actually quite light

items.name: Construction Supplies
items.flavor_text: Construction tools stored in a meta drum. Great for factories or warehouses.

items.name: Iron Pipes
items.flavor_text: A pile of iron pipes that looks like it belongs at a construction site

items.name: Wheelbarrow
items.flavor_text: A wheelbarrow carrying a large mound of dirt. A lot of construction sites probably have these!

items.name: Iron-scaffold Plank
items.flavor_text: A plank that rests atop an iron scaffold. Try using it to extend the length of your scaffolding!

items.name: Iron Scaffold
items.flavor_text: A sturdy scaffold used for constructing buildings. The plank's bumpy surface provides great tractions.

items.name: Plain Chest
items.flavor_text: A chest with a simple design. It can be used to store items.

items.name: Office Cabinet
items.flavor_text: Compacy furniture that's surprisingly spacious. Open the sliding door to put items inside

items.name: Poké Ball Chest
items.flavor_text: This looks like a giant Poké Ball. It opens wide for you to store things inside

items.name: Berry Case
items.flavor_text: At a glance, this looks just like a glossy Cheri Berry. It opens wide for you to store things inside

items.name: Antique Chest
items.flavor_text: Its four curvy legs are adorable. Try putting lots of different things in the draw

items.name: Plain Closet
items.flavor_text: Open the curtains and store your stuff! You don't actually need the hangers-but they're there anyway!

items.name: Office Locker
items.flavor_text: A large locker that can even hold clothing. Try storing lots of different things in it!

items.name: Antique Closet
items.flavor_text: A large bulky closet. Try storing different things in it!

items.name: Office Shelf
items.flavor_text: This is jam-packed with so many files that it can't hold anything else

items.name: Mug
items.flavor_text: A simple, easy-to-use mug. You could change up the colors, and it would still look great.

items.name: Munna Bank
items.flavor_text: An especially heavy money box. It feels like it's full of coins

items.name: Garbage Bin
items.flavor_text: This trash can is big enough that a Pokémon could probably fit inside!

items.name: Cute Table
items.flavor_text: A table with cute lace and frills. It somehow reminds you of Fairy types

items.name: Pop Art Table
items.flavor_text: A shiny, round table. It's as smooth as a Porygon2

items.name: Stylish Stool
items.flavor_text: A small, round stool with a stylish three-color cushion.

items.name: Cute Chair
items.flavor_text: The ruffle skirt is exceptionally cute and lovely

items.name: Pop Art Chair
items.flavor_text: A chair with a soft design and rounded corners. The colors of the backrest and cushion can be changed

items.name: Cute Sofa
items.flavor_text: A cute, slightly elegant sofa. The backrest is shaped like a Pokémon's wings.

items.name: Pop Art Sofa
items.flavor_text: A soft-looking sofa with cute, rounded edges.

items.name: Pop Art Bed
items.flavor_text: lying on tthis bed feels like being inside of a pod. It's soft, fluffy, and easy to sleep on.

items.name: Berry Bed
items.flavor_text: A large Pecha Berry-themed bed. It's springy texture provides ultimate comfort at bedtime.

items.name: Cute Bed
items.flavor_text: You'll feel like royalty sleeping on this cute canopy bed.

items.name: Cute Dresser
items.flavor_text: Look into the mirror to change your transformation and perfect your look!

items.name: Eevee Doll
items.flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

items.name: Pikachu Doll
items.flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

items.name: Clefairy Doll
items.flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

items.name: Arcanine Doll
items.flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

items.name: Dragonite Doll
items.flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

items.name: Ditto Doll
items.flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

items.name: Substitute Doll
items.flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

items.name: Cute Lamp
items.flavor_text: A cute decorative lamp, even when it's turned off. Power it on to make the central heart glow.

items.name: Pop Art Lamp
items.flavor_text: The bright bulb bounces off a shiny lampshade. Looking at it seems to improve your mood!

items.name: Cute Flower
items.flavor_text: Cute flowers that bloom in port towns. They would surely be a delightful gift to any Pokémon

items.name: Microwave Oven
items.flavor_text: This lights up when powered on, but it doesn't seem like it can heat anything...

items.name: Refrigerator
items.flavor_text: It emits a slight chill, but it doesn't seem like it can keep anything cold

items.name: Fan
items.flavor_text: Power on this fan to make it swivel. Pokémon might stop by to watch it move

items.name: Air Conditioner
items.flavor_text: A state-of-the-art air conditioner. Press once for cold air, or press twice for hot

items.name: Printer
items.flavor_text: A large printer used by businesses. Perfect for an office or other workspaces!

items.name: Washing Machine
items.flavor_text: While this does make noise when powered on, it doesn't seem to actually wash clothes...

items.name: Toilet
items.flavor_text: Lift the cover and sit on the toilet for as long as you like

items.name: Tablet
items.flavor_text: A convenient, easy-to-carry computer. It's got a hard case so no worries if you drop it!

items.name: Cell Phone
items.flavor_text: A device carefully protected inside a hard case. It can't make calls, even when powered on

items.name: Laptop
items.flavor_text: A sleek, easy-to-carry laptop. Try displaying some photos on the monitor.

items.name: Computer
items.flavor_text: A computer that looks like it belongs in a laboratory. Some notes have been stuck to it here and there

items.name: Television
items.flavor_text: A large television that can be easily viewed from far away. It's a flatscreen, so carrying it is easy-peasy.

items.name: Wall Monitor
items.flavor_text: A monitor that emits blue light when powered on. Try displaying your photographs on it

items.name: Arcade Machine
items.flavor_text: A game machine from a facility somewhere. It looks brand-new, so it probably can still be turned on

items.name: Game Boy System
items.flavor_text: A very sturdy-looking game console. It's old but it still seems to start up

items.name: Humidifier
items.flavor_text: A humidifier with a  distinct round shape. Turn it on to increase the humidity level nearby.

items.name: Jumbled Cords
items.flavor_text: These cords are all tangled up and cannot be separated

items.name: Cd Player
items.flavor_text: A device that plays music. If you find a CD, try putting it inside

items.name: Tabletop Mic
items.flavor_text: A microphone like those used at recording studios or public speeches. Try putting it on a desk!

items.name: Standing Mic
items.flavor_text: A microphone meant for the stage. Standing before it makes you want to burst into song

items.name: Cool Electric Guitar
items.flavor_text: A snazzy guitat strung with strange strings. Holding it would make you feel pretty amped...

items.name: Cool Bass Guitar
items.flavor_text: A snazzy bass guitar strung with strange strings. Holding it would make you feel pretty low-key...

items.name: Audio Mixer
items.flavor_text: Plug it in and switch on the screen. DJ Ditto is in the house!

items.name: Speaker
items.flavor_text: Putting this next to a stage or an audio mixer ought to create an electrifying atmosphere!

items.name: Ceiling Fan
items.flavor_text: Its blades spin round and round when powered on. Great for when you want to circulate air!

items.name: Utility Pole
items.flavor_text: Use these to connect electrical generators to machines and send electricity over long distances.

items.name: Wireless Power-transmitter Switch
items.flavor_text: Connect these to electrical generators to use them. Put a switch nearby to quickly turn things on or off

items.name: Wireless Power Transmitter
items.flavor_text: Use these to connect electrical generators to machines and send electricity over long distances.

items.name: Mini Generator
items.flavor_text: Place this anywhere, and it will generate electricity all on its own. What a remarkable machine!

items.name: Floor Switch
items.flavor_text: A ground-mounted switch that activates nearby machinery when it detects weight

items.name: Wall Switch
items.flavor_text: A switch that would look perfect installed on a house wall. Press it to activate nearby devices

items.name: Card Reader
items.flavor_text: A machine that reads key cards or Pokédexes. Mount it to a wall.

items.name: Laser Sensor
items.flavor_text: When this sensor detects movement, it activates devices nearby

items.name: Security Camera
items.flavor_text: A camera that watches over its surroundings. Place one anywhere you want to keep an eye on

items.name: Town Streetlight
items.flavor_text: Power this with electricity to illuminate the area with gentle light

items.name: Harbor Streetlight
items.flavor_text: A streetlight that invokes harbor vibes. The life buoy stands out as the main highlight.

items.name: Chic Streetlight
items.flavor_text: When powered on, this light emits a gentle glow that faintly illuminates its surroundings

items.name: Double Streetlight
items.flavor_text: When pwoered on, both lamps shine brightly to illuminate their surroundings

items.name: Mushroom Lamp
items.flavor_text: The mushroom emits a gentle glow, illuminating the surroundings with soft light

items.name: Plain Lamp
items.flavor_text: Powering this on illuminates the surroundings with warm light

items.name: Desk Light
items.flavor_text: A light with a simple design. Perfect for brightening up your desk when you need to focus on work.

items.name: Poké Ball Light
items.flavor_text: A neon light that glows red and white when powered on. It would look great on top of a table

items.name: Berry Table Lamp
items.flavor_text: A Rawst Berry made of glass. Power it on to illuminate the area with pale blue light

items.name: Poké Ball Lamp
items.flavor_text: Emits a brilliant light when powered on. This would look great on a shelf

items.name: Model Planet
items.flavor_text: A model of some unexplored faraway planet. It looks jut like a piece of yummy candy

items.name: Red Meteor Lamp
items.flavor_text: When powered on, this sparkles like a shooting star and instantly gives its surroundings a mystical vibe.

items.name: Orange Meteor Lamp
items.flavor_text: When powered on, this sparkles like a shooting star and instantly gives its surroundings a mystical vibe.

items.name: Yellow Meteor Lamp
items.flavor_text: When powered on, this sparkles like a shooting star and instantly gives its surroundings a mystical vibe.

items.name: Green Meteor Lamp
items.flavor_text: When powered on, this sparkles like a shooting star and instantly gives its surroundings a mystical vibe.

items.name: Blue Meteor Lamp
items.flavor_text: When powered on, this sparkles like a shooting star and instantly gives its surroundings a mystical vibe.

items.name: Indigo Meteor Lamp
items.flavor_text: When powered on, this sparkles like a shooting star and instantly gives its surroundings a mystical vibe.

items.name: Violet Meteor Lamp
items.flavor_text: When powered on, this sparkles like a shooting star and instantly gives its surroundings a mystical vibe.

items.name: Luxury Lamp
items.flavor_text: When this lamp is powered on, it emits a gentle light, illuminating its surroundings

items.name: Garden Light
items.flavor_text: A light that's perfect for a garden. Beautifully illuminates flowers-even at night

items.name: Lantern
items.flavor_text: This emits bright light when powered on. You'll feel safe if you have this, even in a dark cave

items.name: Seedot Lamp
items.flavor_text: When mounted to a wall, this looks just like a Seedot hanging from a branch!

items.name: Mirror Ball
items.flavor_text: Sparkles and twinkles when powered on. Quickly turns the whole area into a party zone

items.name: Wall Light
items.flavor_text: A light that can be fixed to a wall. Power it on and it'll light the area with a warm glow

items.name: Shell Lamp
items.flavor_text: It looks like a simple seashell at first glance, but hang it up and power it on, and it emits a gentle light

items.name: Fluorescent Light
items.flavor_text: Shines brilliantly when powered on. Even nighttime feels like noon when this light is on

items.name: Resort Light
items.flavor_text: A light that resembles a ball of tangled string. Its gentle glow creates a fancy atmosphere

items.name: String Lights
items.flavor_text: Hang these lights on the wall and power them on to create a lively atmosphere

items.name: Berry Hanging Lamp
items.flavor_text: When hung from the ceiling and powered on, the tip of the Chesto Berry emits a gentle light

items.name: Surface Light
items.flavor_text: Simple inconspicuous lights. You can embed them in ceilings and walls.

items.name: Spotlight
items.flavor_text: When powered on, this light shines brightly on whatever is in front of it

items.name: Antique Chandelier
items.flavor_text: Hang this from the ceiling to illuminate a room with gentle light. Perfeect for a mansion aesthetic!

items.name: Punching Bag
items.flavor_text: Heavy and packed full of sand. Perfect for practicing punches and kicks!

items.name: Fluff
items.flavor_text: An irresistibly soft tuft of fluff. Pokémon with the Litter specialty may scatter this

items.name: Resort Stool
items.flavor_text: While this stool looks stiff, the cotton padding inside makes it surprisingly soft

items.name: Plain Chair
items.flavor_text: This chair is just the right height for eating meals in the dining room

items.name: Resort Chair
items.flavor_text: A chair perfect for relaxing. Kick back on this to taste a bit of the resort life

items.name: Plain Sofa
items.flavor_text: If you see small Pokémon on this sofa, try sitting down next to them

items.name: Resort Sofa
items.flavor_text: Sitting on this makes you feel like you're in the tropics! Feel free to just laze the day away...

items.name: Resort Bed
items.flavor_text: A refreshingly cool bed made of woven vines. Lying down on this makes you feel like you're at a resort

items.name: Resort Hammock
items.flavor_text: The breeze feels so nice when you're lying on this hammock. It's perfect for dozing off!

items.name: Nonburnable Garbage
items.flavor_text: Trash discared here and there. Apparently some Pokémon are big fans of garbage

items.name: Wastepaper
items.flavor_text: These look tough to craft in their current state. Try recycling them into regular paper

items.name: Garbage Bags
items.flavor_text: Trash bags found most anywhere. Certain Pokémon find their odor irresistible

items.name: Nonburnable Garbage (outdoor)
items.flavor_text: Obtained through a special method, thwese can be placed just as they are now

items.name: Crystal Ball
items.flavor_text: A large crystal ball used for fortune-telling. Give it to a Psychic-type Pokémon and see what happens

items.name: Modern Door
items.flavor_text: A simple yet sturdy door that would make the perfect entrance to a house

items.name: Glass Window
items.flavor_text: A simple window that fits in any space. Arrange multiple vertically orhorizontally-your call.

items.name: Window Pane
items.flavor_text: A framed glass pane. It makes a great window or partition

items.name: Stained-glass Window (upper)
items.flavor_text: A fancy stained-glass window. It's got a slightly retro vibe.

items.name: Stained-glass Window (middle)
items.flavor_text: A fancy stained-glass window. It's got a slightly retro vibe.

items.name: Stained-glass Window (lower)
items.flavor_text: A fancy stained-glass window. It's got a slightly retro vibe.

items.name: Sash Window
items.flavor_text: A long, vertical window with a cute cross trim. Try opening up the bottom half

items.name: Chic Sofa
items.flavor_text: A luxurious high-class sofa. It looks exactly like the ones on the S.S. Anne

items.name: Antique Sofa
items.flavor_text: A retro sofa with Poké Ball designs here and there

items.name: Iron Bench
items.flavor_text: A seat made of solid hardened iron. It's sturdy enough to support even the heaviest Pokémon

items.name: Industrial Bench
items.flavor_text: A simple bench made of wood and iron. The kind you'd expect to find at parks and walking paths.

items.name: Luxury Sofa
items.flavor_text: This sofa is sooo fluffy. It's like sitting on a cloud

items.name: Garden Bench
items.flavor_text: A stylish bench with a vine pattern. Put one down to instantly add some flair to an area

items.name: Pikachu Sofa
items.flavor_text: Pikachu's face is front and center. On the back, you can find a little tail sticking out.

items.name: Wooden Bed
items.flavor_text: This bed gives any room a mountain lodge aesthetic. You'll sleep soudnly surrounded by the woodsy scent

items.name: Guest-room Bed
items.flavor_text: A bed with a rather high-class vibe. It looks like it belongs on a luxury ship or in a fancy hotel.

items.name: Antique Bed
items.flavor_text: This bed has a relaxing, nostalgic atmosphere. The blanket is smooth to the touch

items.name: Industrial Bed
items.flavor_text: A nice, wide bed that works in any type of room. Even a large Pokémon could sleep in it

items.name: Luxury Bed
items.flavor_text: An extravagantly crafted bed. It somehow reminds you of a Luxury Ball!

items.name: Picnic Basket
items.flavor_text: Try putting some food inside, and hungry Pokémon might stop by for a bite

items.name: Tea Set
items.flavor_text: Enjoy an elegant teatime with this gorgeous set that includes a teapot and teacups

items.name: Table Setting
items.flavor_text: This cutlery immediately makes any table look like it belongs in a high-class restaurant

items.name: Afternoon Tea Set
items.flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

items.name: Bonfire
items.flavor_text: When the wood in the center catches fire, this provides warmth and light to a large nearby area

items.name: Inflatable Boat
items.flavor_text: Feels great whether you lie down on it like a bed, or float it on the water like a boat.

items.name: Stone
items.flavor_text: Just a normal stone you can find anywhere. It can be used as a material for a lot of things

items.name: Iron Stand
items.flavor_text: An impressively stury iron stand. Effortlessly supports even heavy items

items.name: Iron Table
items.flavor_text: Iron-crafted with a simple design. This would work well in any sleekly stylish room

items.name: Iron Rack
items.flavor_text: Decorate your space by putting your favorite things on these stackable shelves!

items.name: Stone Table
items.flavor_text: A table made from stones. It's as hard as an Onix!

items.name: Stone Bench
items.flavor_text: A wide, rock-solid seat. This would make a great park bench

items.name: Stone Fireplace
items.flavor_text: A huge fireplace. Light this up to make a space feel warm and cozy

items.name: Strength Rock
items.flavor_text: Though this boulder is incredibly big, it looks like you could use Strength to push it.

items.name: Stone Tiling (wallpaper)
items.flavor_text: Wallpaper that can be used in larger houses. You can appliy it to walls, floors and even ceilings

items.name: Stone Flooring (wallpaper)
items.flavor_text: Wallpaper that can be used in larger houses. You can appliy it to walls, floors and even ceilings

items.name: Stone Brick Wall (wallpaper)
items.flavor_text: Wallpaper that can be used in larger houses. You can appliy it to walls, floors and even ceilings

items.name: Skull Fossil
items.flavor_text: An ancient Pokémon fossil. It looks like a hard, sturdy skill

items.name: Armor Fossil
items.flavor_text: An ancient Pokémon fossil. It looks like a smooth shield

items.name: Jaw Fossil
items.flavor_text: An ancient Pokémon fossil. It looks like a large jaw

items.name: Sail Fossil
items.flavor_text: An ancient Pokémon fossil. It looks like a thin sail from a Pokémon's body

items.name: Wing Fossil (head)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's head. Its jagged fangs look just likea  saw

items.name: Wing Fossil (right Wing)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's right wing. Its finger bones have become part of the wing

items.name: Wing Fossil (left Wing)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's left wing. By joining its bones together, you can tell the size of the wing

items.name: Wing Fossil (body)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's body. A hump juts out from the middle of its rickety spine

items.name: Wing Fossil (tail)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's tail. Long and slend, it looks like it could bend gracefully

items.name: Headbutt Fossil (head)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's head. Its skull is dense and bulbous

items.name: Headbutt Fossil (body)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's body. Its torso is big, but its arms are quite small

items.name: Headbutt Fossil (tail)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's tail. Its base is thick and sturdy

items.name: Shield Fossil (head)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's head. Its sturdy, like a giant shield

items.name: Shield Fossil (body)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's body. Its thick bones supported a heavy head.

items.name: Shield Fossil (tail)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's tail. Its hind hooves are particularly large.

items.name: Despot Fossil (head)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's head. Its large fangs are as sharp as knives

items.name: Despot Fossil (body)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's body. Its sharp claws look like they could slice through anything

items.name: Despot Fossil (legs)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's legs. Two stocky legs support the rest of its body.

items.name: Despot Fossil (tail)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's tail. Even the very tip is spiky like its frill

items.name: Tundra Fossil (head)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's head. It has sails that resemble an aurora

items.name: Tundra Fossil (body)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's body. It must have been pretty tall with a spin like this

items.name: Tundra Fossil (tail)
items.flavor_text: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's tail. The tip is curled up and looks like a spring

items.name: Stone Brick Wall
items.flavor_text: Stone bricks that exude calmness. They're perfect for making buildings, flower beds, and such.

items.name: Stone Pillar (upper)
items.flavor_text: A heavy stone pillar with a design that would pair nicely with a fancy brick wall

items.name: Stone Pillar (middle)
items.flavor_text: A heavy stone pillar with a design that would pair nicely with a fancy brick wall

items.name: Stone Pillar (lower)
items.flavor_text: A heavy stone pillar with a design that would pair nicely with a fancy brick wall

items.name: Stone Flooring
items.flavor_text: Place these to create an entryway. Most folks won't notice if it gets a little dirty.

items.name: Stone Tiling
items.flavor_text: Even rough, ordinary stones can be polished and stacked to make shiny tiles

items.name: Stone Steps
items.flavor_text: Steps made of stacked stones. Place several of these for a stately atmosphere

items.name: Stone Hipped Roof
items.flavor_text: You can arrange these vertically or horizontally to make a roof

items.name: Stone Roof Valley
items.flavor_text: When you're planning out the shape of your roof, putting in some valleys adds a really nice touch

items.name: Stone Roof Decoration
items.flavor_text: Try putting this on a roof! It looks great whether you install one or a whole bunch

items.name: Stone Fencing
items.flavor_text: Looks great on its own or arranged in a row.

items.name: Stone Debris
items.flavor_text: Sometimes found blocking the road. Break them to obtain stones.Note: Not registered in collection

items.name: Metal Debris
items.flavor_text: It's hard to tell what these warn out objects were originally. They look difficult to process as is.Note: Not registered in collection

items.name: First Aid Kit
items.flavor_text: A box with lots of medicines and supplies for treating injuries

items.name: Letter
items.flavor_text: A simple sealed letter. It has a Poké Ball stamp on it

items.name: Notepad
items.flavor_text: It's full of important-looking notes, so there's no space to write anything else!

items.name: Open Book
items.flavor_text: A classic hardcover book. It's probably got a lot of difficult words inside

items.name: Papers
items.flavor_text: Lots of tiny words are written on the white pages along with drawings of colorful shapes

items.name: Newspaper
items.flavor_text: Its pages are filled with small, tightly-packed letters. What could be written here?

items.name: Information Board
items.flavor_text: A sign with information about the town written on it. Nobody knows what town it's for, though.

items.name: Berry Table
items.flavor_text: A large Aspear Berry table. It looks real enough to make you want to bite into it.

items.name: Berry Chair
items.flavor_text: When placed on the ground, it looks just like a buried Leppa Berry. The steam and leaves are a backrest.

items.name: Berry Basket
items.flavor_text: A basket packed with berries. Line up a few to make your very own fruit stand!

items.name: Berry Clock
items.flavor_text: A clock that resembles an Oran Berry cross section. Try mounting it on a wall

items.name: Berry Wall Decoration
items.flavor_text: The six swaying berries look incredibly tasty. Alas, they're inedible

items.name: Berry Print (wallpaper)
items.flavor_text: Wallpaper that can be used in larger houses. You can appliy it to walls, floors and even ceilings

items.name: Berry Print
items.flavor_text: Sweeyt berries, spicy berries, bitter berries... This pattern has berry flavors for everyone

items.name: Mud
items.flavor_text: A mass of muddy debris. Spray it with Bubble to clean it up!Note: Not registered in collection

items.name: Campfire
items.flavor_text: A campfire made from gathered sticks. When lit, it illuminates the area with a warm light.

items.name: Torch
items.flavor_text: If you light this, it'll burn slowly, filling the area with bright light

items.name: Slender Candle
items.flavor_text: Light this up to get a flickering bright-red flame. It's small enough to fit on a desk

items.name: Eerie Candle
items.flavor_text: Fwoosh! This candle glows with a bluish flame when lit. It's small enough to fit on top of a desk.

items.name: Wall Torch
items.flavor_text: A simple light that looks appropriate even on rugged surfaces such as caves and rock walls

items.name: Firepit
items.flavor_text: Set this ablaze to illuminate the surroundings with bright light. Fwoosh!

items.name: Straw Table
items.flavor_text: Table may be an overly generous description of this big slab of stone atop a pile of hay

items.name: Log Table
items.flavor_text: With just some cutting and sanding, you can turn logs into a proper table

items.name: Garden Table
items.flavor_text: A stylish table that would look nice with a garden chair or two

items.name: Log Chair
items.flavor_text: You can sit on this log to take a quick breather. Other Pokémon might stop by to take a break too.

items.name: Garden Chair
items.flavor_text: A chair that would be perfect in a nice garden. Take a seat and enjoy an elegant afternoon.

items.name: Log Bed
items.flavor_text: A bed made from small logs. You'll sleep soundly enveloped by a woodsy aroma

items.name: Straw Bed
items.flavor_text: It's a little itchy, but that doesn't bother Pokémon. They'll snooze away just fine on this.

items.name: Modern Sink
items.flavor_text: A state-of-the-art sink that even has a drain. Turn the handle to make water flow out

items.name: Sink
items.flavor_text: A stylish sink on a wooden stand. Turn on the faucet to make water pour out.

items.name: Beach Parasol
items.flavor_text: Place one of these on the beach for protection from scorching sunbeams

items.name: Horsea Fountain
items.flavor_text: Installing this near water should raise the humidity of its surroundings

items.name: Fishing Rod
items.flavor_text: A must-have item for fishing up Pokémon. Set one by the water and wait patiently for a bite!

items.name: Mystic Water
items.flavor_text: A teardrop-shaped gem. Try hanging it up in a frame!

items.name: Antique Table
items.flavor_text: Its lumpy legs are cute. You can make a large table by arranging several of these together

items.name: Chic Table
items.flavor_text: A table that would look right at home in a facny restaurant. Perfect for a decadent dinner

items.name: Luxury Table
items.flavor_text: An extravagant marble table. Setting one down brings elegance to any room.

items.name: Chic Chair
items.flavor_text: A luxurious loung chair. Sitting on its soft cushions is absolutely beyond compare!

items.name: Antique Chair
items.flavor_text: A chair with a charming retro design. Its cushions are soft and fluffy

items.name: Luxury Chair
items.flavor_text: A classy-looking seat with a gemstone embedded in it. Just sitting on it makes you feel rich.

items.name: Antique Dresser
items.flavor_text: Look into the mirror to change your transformation and perfect your look!

items.name: Luxury Dresser
items.flavor_text: Look into the mirror to change your transformation and perfect your look!

items.name: Fancy Pen
items.flavor_text: A high-class ballpoint pen that exudes luxury. A very important person could have used this

items.name: Copper Ore
items.flavor_text: Raw mineral copper. When processed into ingots, it can be used as a crafting material

items.name: Iron Ore
items.flavor_text: Metal that can be obtained from iron deposits. It can also be found among metal debris

items.name: Gold Ore
items.flavor_text: Metal extracted from gold deposits. It glitters with a luxurious sheen

items.name: Pokémetal Fragment
items.flavor_text: Colorful, sparkling metal extracted from Pokémetal deposits.

items.name: Rare Pokémetal Fragment
items.flavor_text: This can sometimes be found in Pokémetal deposits. If you find one, consider yourself extremely lucky!

items.name: Copper Ingot
items.flavor_text: Copper that has been processed in a smelting furnace. It kinda looks like chocolate...

items.name: Iron Ingot
items.flavor_text: Iron that has been processed in a smelting furnace. It's really hard and super heavy.

items.name: Gold Ingot
items.flavor_text: Gold that has been processed in a smelting furnace. Just looking at it makes you feel fancy

items.name: Industrial Desk
items.flavor_text: A desk with a beautifuly wood grain texture. This would even look great outside the house.

items.name: Office Desk
items.flavor_text: A desk often used in offices. The pull-out drawer is locked and won't open.

items.name: Iron Chair
items.flavor_text: Though small, this seat is very sturdy. It doesn't look like it would break easily.

items.name: Iron Bed
items.flavor_text: A slightly narrow bed. It's sturdy enough for a good night's sleep!

items.name: Funky Diffuser
items.flavor_text: The symbol on it looks dangerous, but it doesn't seem like this will actually spew out poison gas...

items.name: Fire Hydrant
items.flavor_text: This device spews water for putting out fires, but you're not really sure how to use it,...

items.name: Iron-plate Flooring (wallpaper)
items.flavor_text: Wallpaper that can be used in larger houses. You can appliy it to walls, floors and even ceilings

items.name: Iron Wall
items.flavor_text: A solid iron wlal. It gives off a slight sheen when it's exposed to light.

items.name: Iron-plate Flooring
items.flavor_text: Iron-plate flooring that looks like it belongs in a factory. Steel-type Pokémon might enjoy this.

items.name: Iron Deposit
items.flavor_text: A rock that looks like a chocolate cookie! Break it open to obtain iron ore.

items.name: Iron Steps
items.flavor_text: Steps that wouldn't look out of place in a factory. They're a bit bumpy, which helps prevent slipping

items.name: Iron Ladder
items.flavor_text: Great for reaching high places. Connect them vertically, then climb straight up

items.name: Metal Chain
items.flavor_text: A thin, sturdy chain. Link a few pieces together and you can use them to climb up to high places

items.name: Iron Door
items.flavor_text: A door with an antique pattern carved onto it. Would pair well with gorgeous furniture

items.name: Iron Gate
items.flavor_text: Fancy double doors with a whirling patten. It would pair nicely with some metal fencing

items.name: Iron Enclosure
items.flavor_text: A single post may be thin and flimsy, but these make a splendid fence when lined up together

items.name: Metal Fencing
items.flavor_text: Looks great on its own or arranged in a row.

items.name: Iron Beam
items.flavor_text: These solid, sturdy beams can be used to support floors and roofs.

items.name: Iron Column
items.flavor_text: Stack these up to form a proper iron pillar!

items.name: Iron Pillar
items.flavor_text: Stack as many as you'd like for a taller pillar. The top platform looks like it can display small items

items.flavor_text: Iron pipes come in all sorts of shapes and sizes. Use them to create looong pipe systems

items.name: Pinwheels
items.flavor_text: Pokémon like to spin these round and round. Wind-producing Pokémon especially like them!

items.name: Large Ventilation Fan
items.flavor_text: A huge, flat ventilation fan-the kind you'd find on top of a building or a house.

items.name: Alarm Clock
items.flavor_text: A loud noise rings out when you press this. Be careful! You might accidentally wake someone up

items.name: Clear Bell
items.flavor_text: A very-old fashioned bell that makes a gentle ringing sound. Ring it in an open space to call Ho-Oh

items.name: Tidal Bell
items.flavor_text: A very-old fashioned bell that makes a gentle ringing sound. Ring it in an open space to call Lugia

items.name: Deck Chair
items.flavor_text: Lean this chair backa nd relax for a bit. It looks great for sunbating.

items.name: Beach Chair
items.flavor_text: Lean back and relax in this chair. It pairs perfectly with a beach parasol

items.name: Sandbox
items.flavor_text: Place this to set up a fun space for playing with sand. Discover what you can create here!

items.name: Tire Toy
items.flavor_text: Tires used in parks as playground equipment. Put them on the ground and have fun hopping over them!

items.name: Slide
items.flavor_text: An essential part of any playground. Its imposing size leaves a real impression

items.name: Small Vase
items.flavor_text: A vase with a single cute flower inside. Put it anywhere to add a splash of color to your life

items.name: Leafy Plant
items.flavor_text: A plant with glossy leaves. It's actually related to the taro root

items.name: Extravagant Flowers
items.flavor_text: With robust orange flowers in full bloom, using this decoration is sure to add some color to an area

items.name: Tall Potted Plant
items.flavor_text: A small, thin palm tree. It comes in a planter so it won't make a mess even if it's placed indoors

items.name: Flat-leaf Plant
items.flavor_text: A plant with flat leaves that look like planks. It's actually a type of succulent

items.name: Twisted Potted Plant
items.flavor_text: A plant with a winding, twisted trunk. It doesn't look like it will get any bigger than it already is.

items.name: Garden Flowers
items.flavor_text: A styish flower pot with cute flowers in full bloom. It would look great as a desk ornament

items.name: Wildflowers
items.flavor_text: Beautiful flowers blooming on fresh dirt. Looking at them seems to soothe the mind

items.name: Seashore Flowers
items.flavor_text: The symbol of a port town. Looking at these seems to refresh you.

items.name: Mountain Flowers
items.flavor_text: Flowers that bloom elegantly, even in rugged, rocky environments. They are sublimely beautiful.

items.name: Skyland Flowers
items.flavor_text: Puffy flowers often found at the skylands. Their blossoms are cute and ethereal.

items.name: Beautiful Flower
items.flavor_text: Gorgeous and extravagant flowers in full bloom. Be wary of the thorns on their stems

items.name: Elegant Flower
items.flavor_text: Flowers that stand tall, even in rugged mountains. Their majestic elegance fills your heart with resolve

items.name: Robust Flower
items.flavor_text: Flowers resolutely blooming toward the sky. Looking at them seems to fill you with energy.

items.name: Handcar
items.flavor_text: These carts clang along atop railway tracks. You can even link a bunch of carts together

items.name: Big Nugget
items.flavor_text: It's made of pure gold that gives off a lustrous gleam. It seems like it was popular among enthusiasts.

items.name: Balloons
items.flavor_text: Balloons of many vibrant colors. They sway back and forth even in the most gentle of breezes

items.name: Wobbuffet Wobbler

items.name: Nugget
items.flavor_text: It's made of pure gold that gives off a lustrous gleam. Try hanging it up in a frame!

items.name: Silver Bottle Cap
items.flavor_text: A lovely silver bottle cap. Try hanging it up in a frame!

items.name: Gold Bottle Cap
items.flavor_text: A lovely gold bottle cap. Try hanging it up in a frame!

items.name: Vending Machine
items.flavor_text: Connect this to electricity to make it light up! Looks like it still has some things inside for sale.

items.name: Crystal Fragment
items.flavor_text: A piece of broken crystal. It's transparent, so you can see right through it.

items.name: Stardust
items.flavor_text: Sand that can be processed into Star Pieces. It can be found on Dream Islands

items.name: Gold Teeth
items.flavor_text: Their lustrous golden shine hasn't changed at all. Maybe someone dropped them long ago?

items.name: Auspicious Armor
items.flavor_text: Heavy armor recreated from armor fragments. Auspicious wishes live within it

items.name: Malicious Armor
items.flavor_text: Heavy armor recreated from armor fragments. Malicious will lurks within it

items.name: Star Piece
items.flavor_text: Apparently, if you give this to a Pokémon visiting from far away, they'll give you a gift in return

items.name: Rainbow Feather
items.flavor_text: A mysterious feather that shines with a rainbow light. Looks like it fell from a Pokémon flying in the sky...

items.name: Silver Feather
items.flavor_text: A mysterious feather that shines with a silver light. Looks like it fell from a Pokémon flying in the sky...

items.name: Vine Rope
items.flavor_text: Obtained by cutting vines, which grow in caves and high-altitude areas

items.name: Twine
items.flavor_text: Obtained by destroying textile garbage. Bug-type Pokémon can also produce it.

items.name: Vine Wall Decoration
items.flavor_text: With just a few leaves and vine ropes, you can make a stylish wall decoration

items.name: Mushroom Streetlight
items.flavor_text: Darkness poses no problem when you've got a gentle mushroom glow.

items.name: Wire
items.flavor_text: A wire that can support objects of any weight. It's perfect for hanging furnishings from the ceiling

items.name: Rope
items.flavor_text: A length of thick, sturdy rope. Tie a few together and climb it to reach high places

items.name: Broken Streetlight
items.flavor_text: This rusted streetlight doesn't even have a light bulb. It can't be powered on anymore.Note: Not registered in collection

items.name: Squishy Clay
items.flavor_text: A soft malleable crafting material used for all sorts of things. It can also be fired and hardened into  bricks

items.name: Mini Plain Bed
items.flavor_text: A small, plain bed. Great for solo sleepers!

items.name: Poké Ball Bed
items.flavor_text: A big bed. Even large Pokémon could sprawl out on it.

items.name: Plain Bed
items.flavor_text: A bed with a simple deisng. It looks like it would mesh with a variety of rooms

items.name: Soft Sand
items.flavor_text: Loose, silky sand. Try hanging it up in a frame!

items.name: Boo-in-the-box
items.flavor_text: Open the box, and -BOING!-out pops the Gengar!

items.name: Gravestone
items.flavor_text: A place where souls can rest in peace. Ghost-type Pokémon might enjoy this

items.name: Mysterious Statue
items.flavor_text: Doesn't seem like anyone knows exactly what this is a statue of...

items.name: Fiery Magby Statue
items.flavor_text: If you place a switch nearby and activate it, Magby will shoot fire out of their mouth! Fwooosh!

items.name: Concrete Pipe
items.flavor_text: Link several of these to make the pipe as long as you want! The inside is pitch black

items.name: Garden Ornament
items.flavor_text: This decoration looks like Maushold spending quality time on a log.

items.name: Armor Fragment
items.flavor_text: A piece of shattered armor. Gather all the shards to create armor brimming with emotions

items.name: Repel
items.flavor_text: When you press the spray cap, a weird scent spritzes out and permeates the area

items.name: Large Lost Relic
items.flavor_text: Is this a time capsule? Professor Tangrowth might know what it is!

items.name: Small Lost Relic
items.flavor_text: It looks like canned food but doesn't seem to have anything isnide. Show it to Professor Tangrowth

items.name: Sign
items.flavor_text: A sign made out of wood. There's an important message witten on it... Probably!

items.name: Signpost
items.flavor_text: A sign that looks like it belongs at a bus stop. It could serve as a guiding landmark in cities or on roads!

items.name: Team Rocket Wall Hanging
items.flavor_text: The symbol of a certain organization. Just looking at it makes you want to get up to some mischief

items.name: Blank Canvas
items.flavor_text: A completely empty canvas. A Pokémon artist might be inspired to paint something on it.

items.name: Painting (landscape)
items.flavor_text: One of Smearguru's passion prjects. The contrast betwee the forest and the mountain is beautiful

items.name: Painting (portrait)
items.flavor_text: One of Smearguru's passion projects. The subject has been masterfully recreated, wobbliness and all.

items.name: Painting (still Life)
items.flavor_text: One of Smearguru's passion projects. Each and every object looks just like the real thing

items.name: Plain Stand
items.flavor_text: This low table has a simple design and is perfect for displaying items

items.name: Food Counter
items.flavor_text: A counter that is perfect for putting out food at parties

items.name: Plain Table
items.flavor_text: This simple table can be placed just about anywhere! Try putting different things on it

items.name: Study Desk
items.flavor_text: Just looking at this desk feels like it will somehow make you smarter

items.name: Mini Bookcase
items.flavor_text: A small bookcase packed with books. It's tiny enough to fit in tight spaces!

items.name: Bookcase
items.flavor_text: Furniture with colorful books arranged on the shelves. It looks like there's room for even MORE books!

items.name: Dining Cabinet
items.flavor_text: A cupboard packed full of plates, cups-even a tea set

items.name: Antique Clock
items.flavor_text: This clock ticks away the hours. It lets out a loud bong at designated times

items.name: Arrow Sign
items.flavor_text: An arrow-shaped sign. You could use it as a guidepost at forked roads

items.name: Frame
items.flavor_text: A frame for hanging an item on a wall. Try putting different things inside!

items.name: Cutting Board
items.flavor_text: Kitchen equipment for making salads. Grab some ingredients and make something tasty!

items.name: Worn Lumber
items.flavor_text: Pieces of wood that are cracked and peeling. They look difficult to process as isNote: Not registered in collection

items.name: Honey
items.flavor_text: Sweet-smelling honey. If you spread some where a Pokémon lives, that Pokémon will return home.

items.name: Sturdy Stick
items.flavor_text: A branch that fell off a tree somewhere. Perfect for making various toys and everyday items

items.name: Leaf
items.flavor_text: A lush, vivid green leaf that you can obtain by cutting trees and grass

items.name: Small Log
items.flavor_text: These can be processed into lumber, but they can also be used as is for certain crafting projects

items.name: Glowing Mushrooms
items.flavor_text: Bioluminescent mushrooms. You can't eat them, but they'd probably make great lights!

items.name: Sea Glass Fragments
items.flavor_text: Pieces of glass that have been polished and buffed by ocean waves. They're used to make glass objects.

items.name: Seashell
items.flavor_text: A common seashell found on sandy beaches. This is useful material for building houses

items.name: Lumber
items.flavor_text: Wood that's been cut so it's easy to use. If you're making something out of wood, this is for you

items.name: Brick
items.flavor_text: Bricks made by baking clay. They're perfect for making buildings, roads and other structures

items.name: Rare Pokémetal
items.flavor_text: Made from smelted rare Pokémetal fragments, these can be used to make various items

items.name: Glass
items.flavor_text: You can make glass by melting sand or sandstone in a furnace, or obtain it by smashing broken windos

items.name: Concrete
items.flavor_text: Made from a thick liquid that has hardened. This stuff is solid and super sturdy

items.name: Paper
items.flavor_text: Pristine white paper made from recycled wastepaper

items.name: Tinkagear
items.flavor_text: A cool gear produced by Tinkaton. You can sense their dedication to the craft contained within it

items.name: Strange Strings
items.flavor_text: These strings make a cool sound when plucked. Use them to make guitars and bass guits.

items.name: Leppa Berry
items.flavor_text: A berry with a rather unremarkable flavor. Restores some PP when eaten.

items.name: Chesto Berry
items.flavor_text: A rock-hard berry with a dry flavor. Restores some PP when eaten

items.name: Rawst Berry
items.flavor_text: The longer and more curled the leaves are, the more bitter this berry tastes. Restores some PP when eaten

items.name: Aspear Berry
items.flavor_text: This berry has a distinctively sharp sour taste. Restores some PP when eaten.

items.name: Pecha Berry
items.flavor_text: A sweet, delicious berry. Restores some PP when eaten.

items.name: Lum Berry
items.flavor_text: A berry that has a well-balanced flavor. Restores some PP when eaten.

items.name: Bean
items.flavor_text: Small beans that are jam-packed with nutrients. Restores some PP when eaten

items.name: Tomato
items.flavor_text: A round, tasty-looking tomato. Restores some PP when eaten

items.name: Wheat
items.flavor_text: They're actually edible raw! Restores some PP when eaten.

items.name: Potato
items.flavor_text: A delicious potato-even with the skin still on! Restores some PP when eaten

items.name: Fresh Carrot
items.flavor_text: You can harvest these spicy carrots by pulling up on their leaves. Restores some PP when eaten.

items.name: Seaweed
items.flavor_text: Seaweed that has washed ashore. Restores some PP when eaten

items.name: Cave Mushrooms
items.flavor_text: Mushrooms that grow in damp places such as caves or under shady trees. Restores some PP when eaten

items.name: Simple Salad
items.flavor_text: An ordinary salad made with leaves. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

items.name: Leppa Salad
items.flavor_text: A sweet salad made with Leppa Berries. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

items.name: Seaweed Salad
items.flavor_text: A bitter-tasting salad made with seaweed. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

items.name: Shredded Salad
items.flavor_text: A sour salad made with finely chopped leaves. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

items.name: Crushed-berry Salad
items.flavor_text: A salad with a dry flavor, made with crushed Chesto Berries. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

items.name: Crouton Salad
items.flavor_text: A spicy salad with a delightfully crunchy texture. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

items.name: Simple Soup
items.flavor_text: An ordinary soup made with Fresh Water. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

items.name: Seaweed Soup
items.flavor_text: A bitter-tasting soup made with seaweed.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

items.name: Mushroom Soup
items.flavor_text: A soup with a dry flavor made with mushroom broth.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

items.name: Electrifying Soup
items.flavor_text: A shockingly spicy soup.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

items.name: Healthy Soup
items.flavor_text: A spicy soup with an aromatic bean flavor.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

items.name: Flavorful Soup
items.flavor_text: A sour soup bursting with flavor. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

items.name: Simple Bread
items.flavor_text: Ordinary wheat bread. Powers up Cut when eaten.

items.name: Leppa Bread
items.flavor_text: Sour-tasting bread made with Leppa Berry jam.. Powers up Cut when eaten.

items.name: Carrot Bread
items.flavor_text: Spicy bread with an intense carrot flavor. Powers up Cut when eaten.

items.name: Recycled Bread
items.flavor_text: Bitter-tasting bread made by reusing other bread. Powers up Cut when eaten

items.name: Fluffy Bread
items.flavor_text: Sweet bread made with Pecha Berries. Powers up cut when eaten.

items.name: Bread Bowl
items.flavor_text: Spicy bread that's delicious even when burnt. Powers up Cut when eaten.

items.flavor_text: An ordinary hamburger steak, made with beans. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

items.name: Mushroom Hamburger Steak
items.flavor_text: A hamburger steak with an intensely dry, mushroomy flavor. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

items.name: Tomato Hamburger Steak
items.flavor_text: A hamburger steak that brings out the sour flavor of its ingredients.. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

items.name: Potato Hamburger Steak
items.flavor_text: A satisfyingly sweet hamburger steak. Powers up Rock Smash a lot when eaten.

items.name: Bitter Hamburger Steak
items.flavor_text: A bitter-tasting hamberuger steak topped with leaves. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten

items.name: Vibrant Hamburger Steak
items.flavor_text: A hamburger steak made with lots of ingredients. Powers up Rock Smash a lot when eaten

items.name: Bruised Berry
items.flavor_text: A bruised berry you got from Chef Dente. Restores a bit of PP when eaten

items.name: Common Candy
items.flavor_text: A piece of candy you got from Chef Dente. Restores some PP when eaten.

items.name: Rare Candy
items.flavor_text: A Rare Candy you got from Chef dente. Restores a lot of PP when eaten.

items.name: Curry And Rice
items.flavor_text: An absolutely essential meal for any party. Enjoy some tasty food alongside other Pokémon!

items.name: Fresh Water
items.flavor_text: Delicious water that's perfect for making soup. Drink some and spit it out to make things wet.

items.name: Soda Pop
items.flavor_text: Fizzy, sparkling soda. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes seawater

items.name: Moomoo Milk Coffee
items.flavor_text: Milky coffee with a comfortingly sweet taste. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes muddy water!

items.name: Roserade Tea
items.flavor_text: Tea with a delicate, elegant aroma. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes a hot spring!

items.name: Chili Sauce
items.flavor_text: Sauce with an enticingly spicy flavor. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes lava!

items.flavor_text: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with gray light.

items.name: Cascade-like Badge
items.flavor_text: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with blue light

items.flavor_text: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with green light

items.name: Mysterious Goggles
items.flavor_text: Goggles with mysterious power. Wearing these allows you to peek into someone's cloud island

items.name: Side Table
items.flavor_text: A side table with a refreshing appearance. It'd be perfect next to a beach chair.

items.name: Wooden Table
items.flavor_text: You only need lumber to make this. Despite its small size, it's still a splendid table

items.name: Counter
items.flavor_text: Line up these counters to make them longer. You can also rotate a few to make some nice corners

items.name: Wall-mounted Table
items.flavor_text: A superb table that can fit snugly in a corner. A row of them would also make a great countertop

items.name: Pokémon Center Counter
items.flavor_text: Line these up to make a Pokémon Center countertop. They have a simple, clean design

items.name: Kitchen Table
items.flavor_text: A glossy table that protects against grime. It would look great placed near a sink and stove

items.name: Push Cart
items.flavor_text: A table cart. Try putting stuff on top of it, like food

items.name: Exhibition Stand
items.flavor_text: You can place these side by side to adjust the size. Try displaying lots of different things on top!

items.name: Mysterious Pedestal
items.flavor_text: Looks like it originally had something on top of it...

items.name: Resort Table
items.flavor_text: This table is made of resilient material and perfectly safe to keep outside, even in rain or a squall.

items.name: Poké Ball Table
items.flavor_text: A round table that looks like a Poké Ball. It's large enough to carry lots of stuff.

items.name: Office Table
items.flavor_text: You can see through the glass surface. If you drop anything underneath it, you'll notice right away

items.name: Avalugg Table
items.flavor_text: A solid table with cracks in it. It looks just like a resting Avalugg

items.name: Straw Stool
items.flavor_text: This is the perfect size for small Pokémon to take a seat!

items.name: Simple Cushion
items.flavor_text: A simple practical cusion. It's filled with cotton and provides a soft seat.

items.name: Plain Stool
items.flavor_text: A stool with a simple design. Small Pokémon can use this as a seat

items.name: Industrial Chair
items.flavor_text: A perfectly round chair that can easily fit anywhere. Surprisingly sturdy, thanks to its iron legs.

items.name: Waterproof Seat
items.flavor_text: A smooth waterproof chair. Place it near a bathtub or shower

items.name: Wooden Stool
items.flavor_text: It's a little chipped but surprisingly sturdyy. Even if a Pokémon sits on it, it won't break. Probably.

items.name: Public Seat
items.flavor_text: A simple chair without a backrest. Try arranging a bunch of 'em together

items.name: Soft Seat
items.flavor_text: A cushioned seat that's soft and fluffy-perfect for waiting rooms, relaxation spaces, and the like!

items.name: Box Sofa
items.flavor_text: A small square sofa. Line up several of them to make a wide chic sofa

items.name: Fancy Chair
items.flavor_text: A high-class chair with a real dignified feel to it. Just sitting here will make you feel important.

items.name: Spectator Chair
items.flavor_text: Audience seats like those are found at concert halls or stadiums. Try arranging a bunch of 'em in a row!

items.name: Folding Chair
items.flavor_text: A foldable chair that's simple and easy to carry. Set these up at event venues or similar spaces!

items.name: Office Chair
items.flavor_text: With a gentle curve to support the body, this chair was designed to help you sit longer without tiring

items.name: Wooden Bench
items.flavor_text: A long bench that's perfect for taking a break. Pokémon might sit next to each other here.

items.name: Poké Ball Sofa
items.flavor_text: Experience sitting in an open Poké Ball! Seats two comfortably

items.name: Naptime Bed
items.flavor_text: Kick back right on top of Snorlax's belly. It feels so comfy you could snooze through the whole day

items.name: Wall Mirror
items.flavor_text: Look into the mirror to change your transformation and perfect your look!

items.name: Large Mirror
items.flavor_text: Look into the mirror to change your transformation and perfect your look!

items.name: Wiggly Mirror
items.flavor_text: Look into the mirror to change your transformation and perfect your look!

items.name: Plate
items.flavor_text: Dishware made from fired clay. A Pokémon might eat food served on it.

items.name: Offering Dish
items.flavor_text: Try placing food in this platter as an offering to Mosslax!

items.name: Party Platter
items.flavor_text: A plate for serving party food. No sneaking a taste before the party starts, though!

items.name: Paper Party Cups
items.flavor_text: Paper cups that are easy to carry- perfect for hosting a party!

items.name: Pizza
items.flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

items.flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

items.name: Soda Float
items.flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

items.name: Chocolate Cookies
items.flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

items.name: Ribbon Cake

items.name: Pitcher-plant Pot
items.flavor_text: A flower vase with a pink lip that resembles a Pokémon's mouth. It emanates a faintly sweet aroma

items.name: Small Garbage Can
items.flavor_text: A simple, colorful trash can, perfect for indoor use

items.name: Pencil Holder
items.flavor_text: A pencil holder with lots of poencils in it. Try putting this on top of a study desk

items.name: Book
items.flavor_text: A thick hardcover book. The pages inside were written in small print

items.name: Book Pile
items.flavor_text: A pile of upturned books with torn-out pages. They look like they fell off from a bookshelf

items.name: Photo Frame
items.flavor_text: You can put one of your photos in this frame and place it on a table or stand

items.name: Wall Photo Frame
items.flavor_text: You can put one of your photos in this frame and hang it on a wall.

items.name: Corkboard
items.flavor_text: Choose one of your favorite photos to hang on this corkboard!

items.name: Cooking Stove
items.flavor_text: A simple stylish stove. Turn the dial and flames will shoot right out of it

items.name: Towel Rack
items.flavor_text: A simple wall rack with a towel hanging on it. This would look great next to a sink

items.name: Microscope
items.flavor_text: A microscope often found in chemistry labs and research institutions. Essential for experiments!

items.name: Science Experiment
items.flavor_text: Chemicals, testing equipment, and a clipboard... OK! The experiment is ready to begin!

items.name: Big Drum
items.flavor_text: A very impessive drum. Beat it to produce a loud, invigorating da-a-DUM!

items.name: Punching Game
items.flavor_text: Slug this machine real good with your first, and it'll tell you how strong your punch is

items.name: Step Stool
items.flavor_text: A step stool for reaching things in high places. Try climbing on top of it.

items.name: Whiteboard
items.flavor_text: A whiteboard covered in writing and sticky notes that looks like it belongs in a lab

items.name: Control Unit
items.flavor_text: This has a bunch of switches, but it doesn't look like any of them do anything

items.name: Ship's Wheel
items.flavor_text: A wheel used to steer a ship. It spinds round and round when you touch it!

items.name: Gym Emblem Statue
items.flavor_text: This stone statue makes you feel pumped up. Would look great on a pedestal

items.name: Spacesuit
items.flavor_text: Clothing designed for living in outer space. Keeps the wearer safe even in an airless environment

items.name: Wall Calendar
items.flavor_text: A calendar that's simple and easy to use. It meshes well with pretty much any wall.

items.name: Decorative Bookshelf
items.flavor_text: A decorative shelf with colorful books on it. Perfect for livening up any wall!

items.name: Decorative Storage Shelf
items.flavor_text: A decorative shelf lined with ceramic bottles. Attach it to a wall to liven up any space!

items.name: Decorative Plant Shelf
items.flavor_text: A long vine droops from the potted plant on this decorative shelf. Perfect for livening up any wall!

items.name: Rowlet Clock
items.flavor_text: A wall clock shaped like a small house. Rowlet will pop out to let you know what time it is

items.name: Hanging Banner
items.flavor_text: Cloth you might find on a department store's wall. Stack several to make 'em even longer

items.name: Party Bunting
items.flavor_text: These make perfect party decorations. Hang a bunch to create a festive mood!

items.name: Hanging Scroll
items.flavor_text: A scrol with phenomenal brushwork. Hang it on a wall to create a solemn atmosphere

items.name: Castform Weather Charm
items.flavor_text: A reversible Castform doll. Rumor has it, when the doll changes form, the weather changes too!

items.name: Grubby Letter
items.flavor_text: A yellowed letter, still sealed. It's got a postage stamp with a Poké Ball pattern on it.

items.name: Grubby Notepad
items.flavor_text: It looks like there's some pretty important stuff written on this, but it's a little grimy

items.name: Grubby Papers
items.flavor_text: Lots of tiny words are written on the yellowed pages along with drawings of colorful shapess.

items.name: Grubby Newspaper
items.flavor_text: A newspaper with noticeable dirt and grime. It smells like old paper

items.name: Grubby Tablet
items.flavor_text: A convenient, easy-to-carry deivce. Even though it's inside a hard case, the screen is cracked

items.name: Grubby Cell Phone
items.flavor_text: A device with a cracked screen. It can't make any calls, even when powered on.

items.name: Wall-mounted Flowers
items.flavor_text: A planter with colorful flowers. Hang one on a wall to create a vibrant space.

items.name: Chansey Plant
items.flavor_text: A tree that looks just like a Chansey! Looking at it seems to fill you with a gentle energy

items.name: Bike
items.flavor_text: A cool bicycle that looks high-end. It sparkles as if it's brand-new

items.name: Planter
items.flavor_text: Plant some flower or vegetable seeds here, and raise them until they're fully grown.

items.name: Cart
items.flavor_text: It has a large bed, so it looks like you can use it to haul some pretty big stuff.

items.name: Perch
items.flavor_text: A branch perch where bird Pokémon can rest. Place a few and you might get some visitors.

items.name: Wooden Birdhouse
items.flavor_text: A birdhouse filled with dry, soft grass. Bird Pokémon would probably love lounging here.

items.name: Mailbox
items.flavor_text: A box for receiving letters. It'd look really nice in front of a house!

items.name: Weather Vane
items.flavor_text: A decoration that spins around and around in the wind. Looks like a bird Pokémon perched on a post.

items.name: Cannon
items.flavor_text: Put fireworks or a Pokémon with the Explode specialty inside, light the fuse, and watch 'em fly!

items.name: Bell
items.flavor_text: A golden, wall-mounted bell. When struck, it rings with a pleasant sound.

items.name: Small Stage
items.flavor_text: Get on and start dancing! You can power on the lights by hooking this up to electricity

items.name: Hot-spring Spout
items.flavor_text: Place this next to a pool of hot water to create a genuine hot-spring vibe

items.name: Canoe
items.flavor_text: A paddle, bucket and rope is all you need for a journey out to sea

items.name: Menu Board
items.flavor_text: Specials are written on this board, but it doesn't seem like Pokémon can actually read them.

items.name: Raichu Sign
items.flavor_text: A sign depicting Raichu discharging electricity. When powered up, the neon lighting glows brightly

items.name: Photo Cutout Board
items.flavor_text: Put your fac through the hole to become Plusle or Minun!

items.name: Barrel
items.flavor_text: It's totally empty inside. You could put something on top to make it look nice

items.name: Recycling Bin
items.flavor_text: A bin for disposing of empty cans. It's just big enough for a Pokémon to fit inside

items.name: Grubby Rags
items.flavor_text: A piece of tattered cloth unsuitable for processing. Cut it up to obtain twine.

items.name: Traffic Cone
items.flavor_text: When lined up, the cones are connected by barrier poles. Great for construction zones!

items.name: Sewer-hole Cover
items.flavor_text: A sewer-hole cover that opens like a door. It can serve as an entrance  if you put it on top of a hole

items.name: Excavation Tools
items.flavor_text: A sturdy-looking pickax and shovel. They're wasted on any Pokémon who can already dig, though.

items.name: Tires
items.flavor_text: This tire stack looks like it could collapse at any moment, but oddly enough it stays upright

items.name: Heat Rock
items.flavor_text: A mysterious rock that radiates heat. Place it to raise the temperature around it.

items.name: Icy Rock
items.flavor_text: A mysterious rock that radiates cold. Place it to lower the temperature around it.

items.name: Smooth Rock
items.flavor_text: A mysterious rock that feels smooth. Place it to lower the humidity of the surrounding area.

items.name: Damp Rock
items.flavor_text: A mysterious rock that feels damp. Place it to raise the humidity of the surrounding area.

items.name: Ditto Flag
items.flavor_text: A flag that marks Ditto's house. Place it on a house you want to live in.

items.name: Workbench
items.flavor_text: Try gathering lots of materials and making a variety of different things here!

items.name: Community Box
items.flavor_text: Pokémon can deposit items they've stumbled upon into this box or take items out to process them

items.name: Frying Pan
items.flavor_text: Kitchen equipment for making hamburger steak. Put this on a stove or campfire

items.name: Stylish Frying Pan
items.flavor_text: Kitchen equipment for making hamburger steak. Put this on a stove or campfire

items.name: Cooking Pot
items.flavor_text: Kitchen equipment for making soup. Put this on a stove or campfire

items.name: Stylish Cooking Pot
items.flavor_text: Kitchen equipment for making soup. Put this on a stove or campfire

items.name: Bread Oven
items.flavor_text: Kitchen equipment for baking bread. Have a Pokémon light the fire for you.

items.name: Smelting Furnace
items.flavor_text: A furnace for processing ore into metals. Get a Pokémon with the Burn specialty to help you out

items.name: Metallic Smelting Furnace
items.flavor_text: A high-performance metallic furnace that can quickly process metals and other ingredients

items.name: Concrete Mixer
items.flavor_text: A Pokémon with the Crush specialty can use this to make concrete out of water and stone

items.name: Railway Track
items.flavor_text: Lay down tracks to create a railway, then ride a handcar to get where you're going in a jiffy!

items.name: Crossing Gate
items.flavor_text: With its characteristic black-and-yellow lines, this can be used to designate loading zones for a handcard

items.name: Elevator Platform
items.flavor_text: You can make a functional elevator by using ladders to vertically connect two elevator platforms

items.name: Lift Platform
items.flavor_text: Place two of these with enough distance between them to create an automatic transport system

items.name: Cash Register
items.flavor_text: Place this on a table and power it on, and Pokémon will come by to conduct trades!

items.name: Sprinkler
items.flavor_text: An irrigation device that sprays water in a wide area. Try putting one near the waterside

items.name: Mini Floodgate
items.flavor_text: Turn the handle on top to start or stop the flow of water

items.name: Leppa Seeds
items.flavor_text: Seeds that grow into Leppa trees. Try planting them in some soil

items.flavor_text: Seeds that grow into Chesto trees. Try planting them in some soil

items.flavor_text: Seeds that grow into Rawst trees. Try planting them in some soil!

items.name: Potato Seeds
items.flavor_text: Seeds that grow into poatoes. Try planting them in a field

items.name: Tall Grass
items.flavor_text: Grass that smells faintly of soil. It looks perfect for Pokémon to hide in

items.name: Yellow Tall Grass
items.flavor_text: Grass that often grows by the seaside. It has a bright, tropical color.

items.name: Red Tall Grass
items.flavor_text: Grass that grows far and wide, even on volcanoes or tall mountains. Its tips are as red as lava.

items.name: Pink Tall Grass
items.flavor_text: Grass that paints the surface of the skylands pink with its floral hue

items.name: Green Shoots
items.flavor_text: Small, sparsely grown plants that stand strong no matter how much you walk on them

items.name: Yellow-green Shoots
items.flavor_text: Small, sparsely grown plants that stand strong no matter how much you walk on them

items.name: Verdant Shoots
items.flavor_text: Small, sparsely grown plants that stand strong no matter how much you walk on them

items.name: Blue-green Shoots
items.flavor_text: Small, sparsely grown plants that stand strong no matter how much you walk on them

items.name: Duckweed
items.flavor_text: It floats gentle on the water's surface. Some Pokémon probably love sitting on this

items.name: Flowering Duckweed
items.flavor_text: Duckweed leaves floati n the water and support the blooming flowers that are larger than them

items.name: Dense Vines
items.flavor_text: Hardy, creeping vines that cling securely to things that plants can't grow in, like bricks and boulders.

items.name: Moss
items.flavor_text: This plant can grow anywhere dim and damp-even on boulders

items.name: Fern
items.flavor_text: An unusual plant that can grow in coarse volcanic ash or bumpy igneous boulders

items.name: Leppa Tree
items.flavor_text: A tree that grows Leppa Berries. Berries that fall from its branches are sure to grow back after a while

items.name: Large Palm Tree
items.flavor_text: A large tree that grows by the seaside. Its shape looks just like an Exeggutor

items.name: Pointy Tree
items.flavor_text: These pointy trees grow in all sorts of different places. They look pretty prickly

items.name: Adorable Hedge
items.flavor_text: A round hedge often seen in wide-open fields. Cute flowers are blooming on it

items.name: Healthy Hedge
items.flavor_text: A hedge that has grown tall in the sunshine. Looking at it seems to fill you with vigor.

items.name: Damp Hedge
items.flavor_text: A hedge with lustrous flowers blooming on it. It might be even more beautiful on a rainy day.

items.name: Stylish Hedge
items.flavor_text: With petals blooming one atop the other, this fluffy hedge looks just like Mareep wall

items.name: Square Plant
items.flavor_text: A bush that has grown thick, dense leaves. You can make a hedge by joining a few of these together

items.name: Leppa Tree Stump
items.flavor_text: A stump left behind after cutting down a Leppa tree. It looks like it would make a great seat

items.name: Palm Tree Stump
items.flavor_text: Sit on this stump, gaze out at the sea, and enjoy total relaxation.

items.name: Pointy Tree Stump
items.flavor_text: The remains of a felled pointy tree. The stump itself is round and not pointy at all

items.name: Driftwood
items.flavor_text: The remains of a tree that washed ashore. It would look great as a piece of interior décor

items.name: Sticky Web
items.flavor_text: A web that clings to walls or rocks. If you get tangled in it, you might have a hard time moving

items.name: Large Boulder
items.flavor_text: A large, heavy boulder. Looks like even hardened fists couldn't break this.

items.name: Mossy Boulder
items.flavor_text: The dense moss clinging to it can't be peeled off

items.name: Molten Rock
items.flavor_text: Lava that's cooling and ahrdening. Pour water on it to instantly harden it.

items.name: Cooled Molten Rock
items.flavor_text: Molten rock that has been cooled with water. Heat it up again by placing it near lava!

items.name: Stalagmites
items.flavor_text: Mineral formations that jut from the ground in limestone caverns. They look like big Pokémon fangs!

items.name: Stalactites
items.flavor_text: Dissolved limestone that has rehardened. These hang from the ceilings of limestone caverns

items.name: Icicle
items.flavor_text: Formed when moisture on the ceiling freezes into ice. Place these to cool the surrounding area.

items.name: Crystal Cluster
items.flavor_text: Gemstones that brightly sparkle in caves. Shatter one and use the pieces to make something!

items.name: Dowsing Machine
items.flavor_text: Partner up with a Pokémon skilled at searching and use this to find hidden treasures.

items.name: Neo Dowsing Machine
items.flavor_text: The upgraded Dowsing Machine! It can now find a special location.

items.name: Party Popper
items.flavor_text: Celebrate with a loud pop and some confetti! But be careful-you can only use each one once

items.flavor_text: It may look like a bunch of junk, but every single piece here is worthy of study to a professor.
