items.flavor_text: A certificate awarded to those who have completed their Pokédex. Time to show off your accomplishment

items.name: Wooden Wall
items.flavor_text: Line up a bunch of these to build a wall. They give off a faint but pleasant woodsy aroma

items.name: Light Wooden Wall
items.flavor_text: Line up a bunch of these to build a wall. The wood grain pops more than a regular wooden wall's

items.name: Painted Wall
items.flavor_text: While the planks of this wall have been painted over, a closer inspection reveals they're a little dirty

items.name: Plaster Wall
items.flavor_text: Gather some shells, crush them up, and compact them to make the perfect wall of gritty plaster

items.name: Cloth Wall
items.flavor_text: Simple cloth walls. Try them out in interior spaces

items.name: Guest-room Wall
items.flavor_text: Made from the same material as cloth walls, this was used for the guest rooms of a luxury cruise ship

items.name: Starry-sky Wall
items.flavor_text: These stars shine even in the dark. Stack them up to create a night sky filled wiith stars

items.name: Cushy Wall
items.flavor_text: An exceptionally shiny wall that feels very high-class. Pairs wonderfully with luxury furniture items

items.name: Modern Wall
items.flavor_text: When cut into pieces and arranged, even rugged rocks can be transformed into a stylish wall.

items.name: Broken-tiling Wall
items.flavor_text: A wall made up of shattered tiles. It shines like glass when the light hits it

items.name: Cobblestone Wall
items.flavor_text: A tightly packed mass of stones of various sizes. Perfect for stacking as well as making walls

items.name: Brick Wall
items.flavor_text: These really stand out when stacked up. Use them to make eye-catching buildings

items.name: Aged-stone Wall
items.flavor_text: It's chipped in places and the colors have faded, revealing a glimpse of its long history

items.name: Patterned Aged-stone Wall
items.flavor_text: It's got some cracks running through it, but its triangular pattern remains as it was long ago

items.name: Concrete Wall
items.flavor_text: Doesn't this sorta remind you of Conkeldurr's concrete pillars?

items.name: Rough Wall
items.flavor_text: A wall made of concrete. Gives a slightly more chic impression than plaster.

items.name: Striped Wall
items.flavor_text: A sharp, stylish wall. Made of sturdy copper, it's perfect for a warehouse

items.name: Bronze Wall
items.flavor_text: A metal wall with a reddish-brown shine to it. It looks like a big piece of chocolate when stacked up

items.name: Stylish Bronze Wall
items.flavor_text: A metal wall with ornate designs on it. Arrange some of these to create a rich and opulent space.

items.name: Stylish Iron Wall
items.flavor_text: A fancy wall made of iron. It provides a nice accent when paired with a regular iron wall

items.name: Gold Wall
items.flavor_text: Pure sparkling gold. It's as dazzling as Gholdengo

items.name: Stylish Gold Wall
items.flavor_text: A golden wall with high-quality stones set in it. This one detail gives it an air of refined elegance

items.name: Crystal Wall
items.flavor_text: A wall that sparkles in the light. It's made of crystal and quite hard

items.name: Poké Ball Wall
items.flavor_text: The white Poké Ball pattern on this wall is always nice and shiny

items.name: Warning Wall
items.flavor_text: Warns of danger with its yellow and black stripes. Maybe you could use it to mark areas off-limits

items.name: Wooden Flooring
items.flavor_text: Flooring composed of hard, tightly aligned wooden planks. It can support a heavy Pokémon. Probably.

items.name: Diagonal Wooden Flooring
items.flavor_text: Place these down to use them as flooring. Their simple design goes with pretty much anything

items.name: Crisscross Wooden Flooring
items.flavor_text: Place these side by side to form a stylish alternating pattern that's perfect for a café floor. How chic!

items.name: Hardwood Flooring
items.flavor_text: Flooring made from arranged pieces of sanded lumber

items.name: Modern Carpeting
items.flavor_text: Soft, fluffy carpeting. It would look nice in a modern building

items.name: Woven Carpeting
items.flavor_text: Carpeting that can be found in offices. Place them next to eachother to form a checkerboard pattern.

items.name: Fluffy Flooring
items.flavor_text: Moderately soft cotton flooring. It probably wouldn't hurt if you fell on it.

items.name: Soft Carpeting
items.flavor_text: Fluffy carpeting that feels as soft as a cloud. Place a bunch together for a really nice look!

items.name: Extravagant Carpeting
items.flavor_text: Walking on this high-class embroidered carpeting makes you feel like a star.

items.name: Tatami Mat
items.flavor_text: Tatami mat flooring often found in traditional homes. You can make this by weaving leaves together

items.name: Felt Mat
items.flavor_text: Often used for carpeting. Felt can be laid out as floring or stacked up into décor

items.name: Puffy-tree Pillar
items.flavor_text: These may look like a big tree when stacked up... but they're actually cushions stuffed with leaves

items.name: Grass Flooring
items.flavor_text: This looks like real grass, but it's actually made of cushions

items.name: Simple Flooring
items.flavor_text: Flooring made by polished hewn stone. It's glossy and hard to the touch.

items.name: Marble
items.flavor_text: Lay down some of this beautifully patterned marble and enjoy a taste of the rich life.

items.name: Lined-stone Flooring
items.flavor_text: Provides a lovely accent when paired with stone flooring

items.name: Dark Marble Flooring
items.flavor_text: Stylish flooring with a dark brown trim. It's perfect for museums and the like.

items.name: Light Marble Flooring
items.flavor_text: Stylish flooring with a light gray trim. Perfect for offices and the like

items.name: Aged-stone Flooring
items.flavor_text: Stone flooring found in ancient ruins. There's something mysterious about its triangular pattern

items.name: Simple Square Tiling
items.flavor_text: These smooth, water-repellant tiles would make a great bathroom wall.

items.name: Stylish Tiling
items.flavor_text: Glossy cermaic tiles that could be used for walls or flooring.

items.name: Hexagonal Flooring
items.flavor_text: Lifeless flooring with a hexagonal pattern. Perfectly suited for high-tech places such as laboratories

items.name: Shop Flooring
items.flavor_text: Flooring that reminds you of shop floors. Try installing a counter and cash register!

items.name: Triangle-design Flooring
items.flavor_text: Shiny flooring with a vibrant, triangular pattern. Make this using Pokémetal!

items.name: Iron Tiling
items.flavor_text: Install these on the floor to create a stylish industrial vibe, like the inside of a warehouse

items.name: Neon Flooring
items.flavor_text: Line these up to make a brightly lit floor. You'll feel like you've wandered into a neon universe

items.name: Cyber Flooring
items.flavor_text: The edges are constantly glowing. Arrange them side by side to create a futuristic atmosphere

items.name: Arched Tiling
items.flavor_text: Each one alone is just an ordinary brick. But placed together, they make a beautiful arching pattern.

items.name: Square Tiling
items.flavor_text: Tiles often found in seaside towns. They have a distinct, slightly rough texture

items.name: Mosaic Tiling
items.flavor_text: Colorfully patterned tile flooring. Set up a fewe blocks to create a metropolitan atmosphere

items.name: Brick Flooring
items.flavor_text: Vivid bricks that remind you of sunny days. Walking along these makes you feel quite cheeful

items.name: Stylish Stone Flooring
items.flavor_text: It's just a bunch of stones piled up-and yet it somehow looks stylish

items.name: Fish-scale Tiling
items.flavor_text: Stone tiles in a beautiful fish-scale pattern

items.name: Asphalt Road
items.flavor_text: Pave the way for Pokémon to have nice roads that are easy to walk on

items.name: Marked Road (horizontal)
items.flavor_text: Asphalt road with a white line on it. Arrange these in a row to make a crosswalk

items.name: Marked Road (vertical)
items.flavor_text: Asphalt road with a white line on it. Arrange these in a row to make a crosswalk

items.name: Gray Circle Flooring
items.flavor_text: The prominent gray circle looks like the perfect spot to install a utility pole

items.name: Hay Pile
items.flavor_text: Bales of straw can be arranged to make walls or flooring, whichever you choose

items.name: Iron Plating
items.flavor_text: Sturdy plating that's even used to make ships. Change its color to your liking

items.name: Cube Light
items.flavor_text: A cube that's constantly emitting bright light, even without electricity. It's made from shining rocks

items.name: Foundation
items.flavor_text: A sturdy foundation made of firmly bonded stone and concrete

items.name: Levee
items.flavor_text: Place these wherever you want to stop the flow of water. Sturdy enough to hold back rivers and oceans

items.name: Scrap Cube
items.flavor_text: A block of condensed cloth and scrap metal. It looks like it was made by a Pokémon skilled at crafting

items.name: Polka-dot Print
items.flavor_text: This pop-art polka-dot pattern looks cute whether you line up a bunch or use some as an accent

items.name: Bubble Print
items.flavor_text: A pattern with lots of floating bubbles. It has a unique ephemeral charm to it

items.name: Vertical-stripe Print
items.flavor_text: Vertical stripes like those on Flaaffy's tail. This simple pattern looks like it'd fit in a variety of places.

items.name: Horizontal-stripe Print
items.flavor_text: Horizontal stripes like those on Elekid. This simple pattern looks like it'd fit in a variety of places.

items.name: Gingham Print
items.flavor_text: A checkered pattern with a white base. A classic, simple design

items.name: Tartan Print
items.flavor_text: a checkered pattern with several colors. The design is both methodical and adorable

items.name: Argyle Print
items.flavor_text: A diamond-shaped checkered pattern. It has a warm, welcoming atmosphere.

items.name: Houndstooth Print
items.flavor_text: If you stare at this pattern for a long time, you just might see a flock of flying bird Pokémon

items.name: Vine Print
items.flavor_text: This twisting, twirling pattern is fully interconnected. It kind of resembles Serperior's patterning

items.name: Swirl Print
items.flavor_text: Straight lines that bend and contort into spirals. Staring at this will make your eyes spiral too!

items.name: Winter Print
items.flavor_text: A pattern with a snowflake motif. Perfect for colder seasons.

items.name: Zig-zag Print
items.flavor_text: A cool pattern that zigzags like Pikachu's tail

items.name: Leaf Print
items.flavor_text: This leaf pattern is easy on the yes and makes you feel like you're in a forest - perfect for relaxation!

items.name: Flower Print
items.flavor_text: A floral pattern with lots of cute flowers. You'll feel like you're on a picnic every time you look at it.

items.name: Star Print
items.flavor_text: A pattern with stars of all sizes. Use it for your floor or walls so you can reach out and touch the stars.

items.name: Curry Print
items.flavor_text: A pattern with a delicious-looking curry motif, packed full of savory vegetable flavor.

items.name: Poké Ball Print
items.flavor_text: A pattern with lots of different-color Poké Balls. It has a cute, pop-art feel to it

items.name: Stylish Poké Ball Print
items.flavor_text: A pattern with a fancy Poké Ball design. It'd look great in any sort of upscale house

items.name: Field Grass
items.flavor_text: Soft soil with grass growing on top. It's perfect for planting  tree or flower seeds.

items.name: Seashore Grass
items.flavor_text: Coastal soil with thin grass growing out of it. If you use Leafage on this, tall yellow grass will grow

items.name: Alpine Grass
items.flavor_text: Dark-green grass often found in valleys

items.name: Sky-high Grass
items.flavor_text: Lush, green grass that grows in white soil.

items.name: Ordinary Soil
items.flavor_text: Regular old soil that's a bit soft. If you use Leafage on it, green tall grass will grow

items.name: Seashell Soil
items.flavor_text: Despite the seashells mixed into it, this soil is softer than sand and capable of supporting plant life

items.name: Striped Soil
items.flavor_text: Soil made up of layers of sediment from volcanic eruptions that accumulated and hardened over time

items.name: Pure-white Soil
items.flavor_text: White soil with a touch of colorful sand mixed in. Often found in the skylands.

items.name: Clay
items.flavor_text: Soft enough for you to leave your footprints on it. It's actually made up of tiny grainds of sand!

items.name: Ordinary Sand
items.flavor_text: Ordinary sand that can be found all over. There's some moisture in it, but it's hardened up a little

items.name: Beach Sand
items.flavor_text: Fine sand found on the beach. If you build a castle out of this, it probably wouldn't collapse.

items.name: Skyland Sand
items.flavor_text: Silky sand found at the skylands. It's lighter in color than ordinary sand

items.name: Bumpy Beach Sand
items.flavor_text: sand with various stones and small seashells packed within. Stepping on it leaves footprints behind

items.name: Volcanic Ash
items.flavor_text: Ash that fell from the sky after a volcanic eruption

items.name: Sandstone
items.flavor_text: Amassed sand, left alone for countless years, has slowly hardened into stone

items.name: Skyland Sandstone
items.flavor_text: Over the course of many years, the sand from the skylands has hardened into rock

items.name: Cliff Rock
items.flavor_text: A type of rock often found on mountain cliffs. Looks like you could break it with Rock Smash

items.name: Spotted Cliff Rock
items.flavor_text: Small rocks from the distant past, often found in valleys, that have hardened over time into stratum

items.name: Red Cliff Rock
items.flavor_text: Red rock that looks like it came from a steep mountainside cliff.

items.name: Red Spotted Cliff Rock
items.flavor_text: Boulders often seen by the seaside. With the waves at their backs, they stand tall, powerful and majestic

items.name: Black Cliff Rock
items.flavor_text: Black rock that looks like it came from a steep mountainside cliff.

items.name: Black Spotted Cliff Rock
items.flavor_text: It's rough and bumpy because it's packed with small rocks. It has a weighty, imposing presence.

items.name: Skyland Cliff Rock
items.flavor_text: A type of rock that towers over all on mountain slopes. It can only be found at the skylands

items.name: Skyland Spotted Cliff Rock
items.flavor_text: Lots of tiny stones are crammed in between skyland cliff rocks, giving them a rugged look

items.name: White Rock
items.flavor_text: A pale, slightly hard rock that is tough to break

items.name: Coarse Rock
items.flavor_text: A type of rock found here and there. It looks like it would be tough to process

items.name: Light Brown Rock
items.flavor_text: A light-brown rock that you can find most anywhere

items.name: Red Rock
items.flavor_text: A somewhat hard red rock often found near lava

items.name: Yellow Rock
items.flavor_text: This stone is commonly found near volcanoes. Its smell makes your nose sting a little

items.name: Black Rock
items.flavor_text: Rugged stone often found near volcanoes. It was originally molten-hot lava!

items.name: Lava Rock
items.flavor_text: When hot lava cools and hardens, it become black, rugged rock.

items.name: Cave Rock
items.flavor_text: Especially hard stone often found in caves

items.name: Ocean Rock
items.flavor_text: Textured rock found by the seaside. It's been worn into this shape over time by the ocean waves.

items.name: Reddish-brown Cave Rock
items.flavor_text: This cave was originally black, but it appears to have turned reddish as it oxidized over tiem

items.name: Volcanic Rock
items.flavor_text: A rock with lots of tiny stone shards packed inside. Looks like it was formed by a volcanic eruption

items.name: Carved White Rock
items.flavor_text: A rock with a curved shape carved into it. Fits snugly onto cave ceilings

items.name: Carved Coarse Rock
items.flavor_text: A rock with a curved shape carved into it. Fits snugly onto cave ceilings

items.name: Carved Light-brown Rock
items.flavor_text: A rock with a curved shape carved into it. Fits snugly onto cave ceilings

items.name: Carved Red Rock
items.flavor_text: A rock with a curved shape carved into it. Fits snugly onto cave ceilings

items.name: Carved Yellow Rock
items.flavor_text: A rock with a curved shape carved into it. Fits snugly onto cave ceilings

items.name: Copper Deposit (wasteland)
items.flavor_text: A rock with bluish-green copper embedded in it. Break it open to obtain copper ore

items.name: Copper Deposit (beach)
items.flavor_text: A rock with bluish-green copper embedded in it. Break it open to obtain copper ore

items.name: Copper Deposit (ridge)
items.flavor_text: A rock with bluish-green copper embedded in it. Break it open to obtain copper ore

items.name: Copper Deposit (skyland)
items.flavor_text: A rock with bluish-green copper embedded in it. Break it open to obtain copper ore

items.name: Gold Deposit
items.flavor_text: A stone that shines with golden glints. Can be crushed and processed into gold.

items.name: Pokémetal Deposit
items.flavor_text: A glittering rock with Pokémetal embedded in it. Break it open t obtain Pokémetal fragments

items.name: Mossy Soil
items.flavor_text: Moss loves growing in damp places. Venture deep into caves to find tons of it

items.name: Gravel
items.flavor_text: Loose paving material made up of rocks of all sizes, big and small

items.name: Limestone
items.flavor_text: This white stone is abundant in limestone caverns and can be processed into many things

items.name: Glowing Stone
items.flavor_text: A mysterious stone that emits rainbow light. Put it somewhere dark to create a mystical atmosphere

items.name: Mysterious Stone
items.flavor_text: A beautiful, transparent stone. It seems to possess a strange power, doesn't it?

items.name: Ice
items.flavor_text: Pristine, beautiful ice that is cold to the touch

items.name: Cracked Sandstone
items.flavor_text: This sandstone looks ready to fall apart. Perhaps a well-placed Rock Smash might finish the job

items.name: Rusted Wall
items.flavor_text: This formerly shiny wall has since become worn and rusted. Restoring it seems out of the questionNote: Not registered in collection

items.name: Wooden Steps
items.flavor_text: If you build steps, it'll be easier for Pokémon to walk on sloping roads.

items.name: Stylish Steps
items.flavor_text: A stylish set of sterps made of plaster and wood. They'd look great alongside some plaster walls

items.name: Concrete Steps
items.flavor_text: A sturdy set of steps made of concrete. Try placing them on paths or in buildings

items.name: Brick Steps
items.flavor_text: Modern steps made of brick. Place lots of these to create a stylish town

items.name: Wooden Ladder
items.flavor_text: Linking these vertically makes climbing even the highest of walls a breeze

items.name: Pulley
items.flavor_text: A pulley that hangs from the ceiling. This works great for hanging ropes or decorations!

items.name: Rustic Door
items.flavor_text: A door reinforced by large crossbeams. It's perfect for huts or ships

items.name: Simple Door
items.flavor_text: A simple door with a glass window. It would look great on a hut or a warehouse

items.name: Boat Door
items.flavor_text: An affluent-looking door with a number plate. Perfect for guest rooms on a luxury cruise ship.

items.name: Stylish Door
items.flavor_text: A door made of glass from top to bottom/ It seems like it would fit well in modern-style rooms

items.name: Brainy Door
items.flavor_text: A door with a practical utilitarian design. Its colors and the shape of its window are both very sleek

items.name: Large Wooden Door
items.flavor_text: A wooden door with a knob that makes it easy to open and close, even for Pokémon

items.name: Automatic Doors
items.flavor_text: You can't open or close these as is, but they function automatically when hooked up to electricity

items.name: Shutter
items.flavor_text: It has a Poké Ball design smack-dab in the middle and feels like it could be the entrance to a secret base

items.name: Wooden Gate
items.flavor_text: This would make a great building entrance-and also work as part of a wooden fence

items.name: Swinging Doors
items.flavor_text: Café-style double doors. Place them at an entryway and watch Pokémon come and go!

items.name: Simple Curtain (left)
items.flavor_text: Plain, simple curtains that work well in any room

items.name: Simple Curtain (right)
items.flavor_text: Plain, simple curtains that work well in any room

items.name: Hatch Window

items.name: Brick Roof Valley

items.name: Handrail

items.name: Harbor Pole

items.name: Arched Barrier (leaf Pattern)

items.name: Wooden Siding (corner)

items.name: Wooden Partition

items.name: Stepping Stones

items.name: Walkway

items.name: Grate Flooring

items.name: Arch Bridge
items.flavor_text: One on its own makes a simple protrustion, but two of them together form a beautiful arch
